case_title: LONNELL BERNARD WORTHY VS. LOREX CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORTHY, LONNELL BERNARD AS TO DEFENDANT LOREX CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-18-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-22-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-03-2011

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORTHY, LONNELL BERNARD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-18-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WORTHY, LONNELL BERNARD
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PRO PER WORTHY, LONNELL BERNARD

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-23-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-19-2012 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST LONNELL BERNARD WORTHY, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-19-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-04-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-21-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-21-2012 AT 2:00PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
